issues.description: effects[] is empty but card has complex counter/triggered ability text. Missing entire effect definition for counter ability that triggers on opponent's Event/Trigger activation.

[Your Turn] indicates this is a Counter ability that can only be activated during your turn, but the effect must also trigger on 'opponent activates an Event or [Trigger]'. Should use trigger type 'Counter' with condition checking opponent's action.
Missing condition for 'If your opponent has 2 or more Life cards' - should include HasLifeCards or similar condition on opponent.
[Your Turn] in text requires duration:'DuringYourTurn' to indicate this counter can only activate during your turn.
